name: Nancy Drew®: Ghost of Thornton Hall
detailed_description:
Strategy guides and other resources available at

 


About the Game

Dare to play this spooky game featuring a missing bride and a dearly-departed ghost haunting an abandoned family estate. Uncover the family's dark secrets and sleuth among spiders, skeletons, and a ghostly graveyard with the help of our paranormal investigator contact.

Some Families Keep Deadly Secrets!

Jessalyn Thornton’s fateful sleepover at the abandoned Thornton estate was supposed to be a pre-wedding celebration, but the fun ended when she disappeared. While her family searches for clues, others refuse to speak about the estate’s dark past. Did something supernatural happen to Jessalyn, or is someone in Thornton Hall holding something besides family secrets?

⚠️ATTENTION MAC USERS: This game will not run on Mojave, Catalina, Big Sur, Monterey, Ventura, or higher Mac operating systems. See compatible operating systems below.
